speaker: MATT
raw_text: So, you'll only have a short time. As the rest of you guys go to rest for the evening and you all go to sleep, Percy, Keyleth, Vax, Vex, and Grog, I need you guys to roll perception checks.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Could he draw some things for me?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: In Gnome, I say, absolutely m'lady. Whatever you would request.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: And in Common, I say back, thank you so much. Doty, would you mind drawing portraits for me?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Do whatever the young lady asks.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Could you draw some portraits of this group? Of Grog. Of Vax and Vex. Keyleth and Percy.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Just a little bit of a note, here. He doesn't know who any of those people are.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So the people that I point to. Could you just draw each of them please?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Everyone's kind of scattered to the four winds right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll help you point them out to Doty.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you point out to where they're all staying and--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: We're gathering up anyway. We're walking over.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: When you're all done, just bring them to me. Thank you so much.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is there any particular style you'd like them to be drawn in?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: And I say, thank you, in Gnomish. In Gnome.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I say, you're warcome in Gnome. (all laugh)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. So as you all go to rest for the evening, Pike, the granted presence here through Sarenrae's will begins to withdraw. Her strength through the divine gate to keep you in this, seemingly drained. You sense that you'll be returning back to Emon until you're retrieved by your allies here.
